Source   Edit  

Imports

aliasmethod, ast, genotype

Types

Component = object
  case kind*: ComponentKind
  of ckToken:
      token: int16
      text: string

  of ckRule:
      name: string
      rule: Production

  of ckTerminal:
      term: Terminal
Source   Edit   
ComponentKind = enum
  ckToken, ckRule, ckTerminal
Source   Edit   
Grammar = ptr GrammarObj
Source   Edit   
Production = seq[Component]
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc initGrammar(gram: var Grammar) {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
initialize a grammar Source   Edit   
proc initGrammar(gram: var Grammar; parseToken: proc (s: string): int16;
                 syntax: string) {....raises: [ValueError, NPegException,
    Exception, IOError], tags: [RootEffect, WriteIOEffect].}
initialize a grammar with the provided bnf syntax specification Source   Edit   
proc start[T](gram: Grammar): Component
Source   Edit   
proc πGE[T](gram: Grammar; geno: Genome): tuple[pc: PC, ast: Ast[T]]
map a genotype using the given grammar Source   Edit
